scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build && rm -rf ../backend/dist ../dist && cp -r dist ../backend/ && cp -r dist ../ && cd ../backend && npx prisma@5 db push && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
